description: H1: SwiGLU activation — OOM (extra gate projection exceeds 80GB VRAM)
H2: Pre-attention causal depthwise conv (kernel=4) — delta -0.0017
H3: Z-loss on output logits (1e-4 coeff) — delta +0.004 REGRESSION
H4: Sandwich norm (post-norm on attn/MLP) — OOM
H5: Per-head attention temperature (50 params) — delta -0.0002 from H2, -0.0019 from baseline
H6: Conv smoothing on V (zero cost) — flat, no improvement
H7: Partial RoPE 75% — delta -0.0035 from prev, -0.0054 from baseline
H8: Attention softcap=30 — flat, no improvement
H9: Remove conv (test if partial RoPE subsumes) — conv is needed, regression +0.003
H10: Learnable RoPE frequencies — OOM (dynamic cos/sin backprop)
H12: Q-norm only (no K-norm) — regression +0.003, K-norm is essential
